headlines.title: Saudi Crude Tanker Goes Dark to Slip Through Bab el-Mandeb
headlines.summary: At least one oil tanker carrying Saudi crude oil has transited the Bab al-Mandeb Strait with its transponder switched off as risks to vessels in the Red Sea spiked this week after the Houthis announced a blockade on Saudi shipments and targeted vessels offshore Yemen. headlines.title: WTI Explodes Higher as Middle East Shipping Risks Multiply
headlines.summary: September WTI crude oil futures were trading at $92.31 late Thursday, up $10.54 or 12.89% for the week. The contract posted a weekly low at $79.58 before climbing to a weekly high at $92.31. This was not a normal risk-premium rally. WTI started the week with the Strait of Hormuz

headlines.title: China Rushes to Secure Russian Oil as Middle East Supply Risks Escalate
headlines.summary: Chinese refiners have bought up all crude oil cargoes set to load from Russia’s Far East port of Kozmino in August weeks earlier than usual, traders with knowledge of the market told Bloomberg on Friday, as risks to Middle Eastern supply spiked this week with attacks on tankers i

headlines.title: Global LNG Giants Target Cambodia as New Energy Market
headlines.summary: Some of the world’s biggest heavyweights in liquefied natural gas exports are interested in adding Cambodia to their client list as the Southeast Asian nation build sits first LNG-fueled power station. headlines.title: Oil Tops $100 as Supply Crisis Deepens
headlines.summary: Crude oil prices were on course for a sizable weekly gain today, as the Strait of Hormuz remains almost entirely paralysed and the Yemeni Houthis target tankers in the Bab el-Mandeb Strait in the Red Sea. headlines.title: OPEC+ Set to Raise Output Again—Even as Members Can't Pump It
headlines.summary: OPEC+ is expected to approve another production target increase when eight key producers meet on August 2, extending a months-long campaign to unwind voluntary supply cuts that have existed largely on paper since the Iran war upended Gulf exports. headlines.title: The AI Paradox Reshaping Clean Energy Research
headlines.summary: Artificial intelligence is a double-edged sword for the energy sector. headlines.title: Insurers Flock to Oil Projects Outside the Middle East
headlines.summary: Global insurers had just shaken off the ESG push from earlier this decade when the Middle East conflict upended oil and gas upstream project coverage.
